description: redBus is an online travel booking service focused on bus tickets in India, with additional train and hotel booking offerings. Its public site also links operators and agents to partner onboarding and business-management portals.
summary: No public developer integration surface was found on redbus.in itself. The site appears to be a consumer travel booking service, while partner/agent onboarding points to separate operator portals and a Seatseller agent site on another domain.
